personal.name: Mahmoud Raafat
personal.title: Graphic Designer & Digital Marketer
personal.tagline: Turning ideas into visual impact — for 15+ years.
personal.about: Creative and results-driven Graphic Designer and Digital Marketer with over 15 years of professional experience delivering high-impact visual solutions across diverse and competitive industries. My work sits at the intersection of strategic communication and visual craft — every design I produce is built to capture attention, reinforce brand identity, and drive measurable engagement.

expertise.title: Visual Content Creation
expertise.description: Designing daily and static posts, stories, and interactive content such as Reels and GIFs.

expertise.title: Brand Identity
expertise.description: Accurately applying brand elements — colors, fonts, logos — with full consistency across every touchpoint.

expertise.title: Paid Advertising Design
expertise.description: Developing creatives for paid advertising campaigns across multiple formats and platforms.

expertise.title: Video & Motion Graphics
expertise.description: Video editing and motion graphics using Premiere Pro and After Effects.

expertise.title: Social Media Management
expertise.description: End-to-end social media visual strategy, including cover images and platform-optimized profile assets.

expertise.title: Creative Idea Generation
expertise.description: Suggesting innovative design ideas that align with current social media trends and competitor research.
